rationale: The cited paper is closely aligned with the citing paper’s core domain (consumer numerical judgments), specifically how numeric processing difficulty/fluency changes perceived magnitude and choices, which plausibly serves as a mechanism or foundational prior for the 2024 paper’s digit-diagnosticity account.
